changes.text: Security hardened: CSP, scoped asset protocol, URL scheme validation
Full WCAG accessibility: ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, screen reader support
Font size control (Small / Default / Large / Extra Large)
High contrast mode and reduced motion preferences
Auto What's New trigger on version upgrade
Forward-compatible shortcut storage (serde default)
Removing Features guide for all 5 optional modules
Claude Code hooks for agent safety
Canvas keyboard renders platform-appropriate keys (Win/Bksp/Enter on Windows)
Canvas keyboard colors read from CSS variables (theme-aware)
Canvas keyboard scales with font size setting
All hardcoded colors replaced with CSS variables or documented mappings
Settings window: flat Premiere-style layout with proper form labels
All utility window footers visually consistent
Window resize edge cases handled with min-size enforcement
Fullscreen shortcut: Ctrl+Cmd+F on macOS, F11 on Windows/Linux
Bring All to Front only shown on macOS
file:// URL construction fixed for Windows paths
Path traversal blocked in crash report reader
Autosave interval enforces 5-second minimum
window.__TAURI__ guarded with fallbacks (no white screen)
Duplicate modifier keys deduplicated in shortcuts
--text-tertiary contrast meets WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Interactive keyboard shortcut editor with Canvas visualization
Shortcut recording, conflict detection, and preset management
Main window with sidebar docs browser and demo launcher
Centralized branding config (branding.js)
Splash screen opens before main window with real init status
Changelog driven from changelog.json
Shared window-utils.js eliminates code duplication
Escape-to-close on all utility windows
Arrow key navigation in settings sidebar
Cmd+F focuses filter in log viewer
File drop prevention on all windows
Text selection enabled where appropriate
color-scheme: dark for native control rendering
All interaction patterns: Escape, Tab, arrow keys, right-click
Framework-agnostic architecture: window.__TAURI__ globals, zero npm deps
Plain HTML utility windows (not React components)
Settings window with Premiere-style sidebar navigation
System tray with minimize-to-tray
Native notifications, autostart, secure keyring storage
Quit confirmation with unsaved changes flow
Single instance lock
Browser shortcut prevention (Cmd+L, F5, etc.)
24-page mdBook documentation
16 Tauri plugins integrated
Complete desktop app skeleton with Tauri v2
Native OS menus with data-driven configuration
Settings persistence with single-source defaults
Autosave with crash recovery
Crash reporting with panic handler and diagnostics
Window state persistence
Recent files management
Dark theme with CSS custom properties
